objective: Close F-0071 by treating the full knowledge_node tree and AI recommendation option universe as verified paginated collections. Any business error, missing or drifting pagination, unexpected empty page, duplicate publicId, or incomplete total must fail closed; the management UI must retain any verified prefix read-only, expose retry, and prohibit create/edit/move/disable until a complete snapshot is loaded. Preserve schemas, write semantics and authorization.
blockedFiles: role, permission, authorization or entitlement changes
persistent database execution or real data access
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.ui: AdminKnowledgeNodeManagement currently paginates the complete tree but converts later-page failures into ready; its create/edit/move/disable controls consume that alleged complete snapshot. Admin and student AI generation consume the AI options route.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routesServices: The knowledge-node management route exposes ordinary paginated pages. The AI generation options route currently reads exactly page 1 with pageSize 100 and relabels the filtered prefix as the full total.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repositories: ContentKnowledgeNodeRuntimeRepository is the shared paginated authority; no repository write or schema change is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: knowledge_node remains unchanged; this task verifies completeness of existing read pagination only.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: Focused pure collection tests cover page errors, missing/invalid pagination, total drift, short/empty pages, duplicates and success. UI tests prove partial read-only state and retry recovery; route tests prove all pages are collected or a standard error envelope is returned.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No schema/migration, persistent database execution, write semantic, authorization, dependency, Provider, external service, resource upload picker, question reference picker, mechanism or historical evidence change.
